reviews.comment:
Lugar limpio y prolijo con cómodo espacio para parar y descansar un momento. Lo que se espera del Acá y no defrauda.

(Translated by Google)
A clean and tidy place with a comfortable space to stop and rest for a moment. It delivers exactly what you'd expect from Acá and doesn't disappoint.

reviews.comment:
Baños sucios, dejaban mucho que desear.  Es importante brindar un servicio de sanitarios limpios con.perchas en el interior de cada baño.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were dirty and left much to be desired. It's important to provide clean restrooms with hooks inside each stall.

reviews.comment:
Solo sirve para cargar combustible. No tienen agua caliente en el dispensador, adentro no te la calientan porque “tienen miedo de quemarse” nos ofrecieron un enchufe para calentar el agua caliente con una pava eléctrica (que debíamos traer nosotros). Baños sucios y si tenes suerte te lavan los vidrios. Cuando pregunté la razón social de la firma no me la quisieron dar. NO ES RECOMENDABLE

(Translated by Google)
It's only good for refueling. They don't have hot water at the dispenser, and they won't heat it up for you inside because "they're afraid of getting burned." They offered us an outlet to heat the hot water with an electric kettle (which we had to bring ourselves). Dirty bathrooms, and if you're lucky, they'll wash the windows for you. When I asked for the company's name, they wouldn't give it to me. NOT RECOMMENDED.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtZ2MzOHd3RRAB
